title: [IOS] Location sharing dialogue is visible on the Home Screen
scenario: On iOS, the location sharing dialogue appears on the Home Screen after accepting the license agreement and privacy policy, prompting the user to allow location access for Poly Lens.
steps: Launch the app on iOS for the first time.
Accept the license agreement and privacy policy.
Tap Continue, Skip, Continue as Guest, or Login.
expected: A location sharing dialogue is displayed on the Home Screen with the headline "Allow 'Poly Lens' to use your location?" and options 'Allow Once', 'Allow While Using App', and 'Don't Allow'. The following text is shown: "Poly Lens uses your location to find your device. See the Poly Privacy Policy in General Settings for more information."
